data.name: Elena's Story: The Vaalbara Chronicle
data.detailed_description:
Elena, an adventurer, finds herself captured by a mysterious race known as the Unians, who live apart from the human world.

The game follows Elena’s time spent in their camp as she struggles with challenges that test her determination and spirit. The harsh environment and trials set by the Unians will push her to adapt and survive.

Game Features

  • This is a visual novel-style adventure game in isometric perspective.

  • The story progresses by moving the characters, interacting with other characters in the underworld, and watching cut-scenes after each conversation.

  • All cut-scenes are animated using character models, without illustrated still images.

Game Features

  • This is a visual novel-style adventure game in isometric perspective.

  • The story progresses by moving the characters, interacting with other characters in the underworld, and watching cut-scenes after each conversation.

  • All cut-scenes are animated using character models, without illustrated still images.
data.short_description: Play as Elena in this isometric hand drawn animated RPG game. Captured by a brutal, sadistic race of demi-humans you shall attempt to escape from their dungeon.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 法文, 德文, 簡體中文, 俄文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-2600K CPU @ 3.40GHz 3.40 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: windows 10
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: windows 10
  • Processor: Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-2600K CPU @ 3.40GHz 3.40 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Storage: 200 MB available space
